# glesys_ip (Data Source)

Get information about a reserved IP address in your Glesys Project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# glesys_dnsdomain datasource
data "glesys_ip" "www-pub" {
  id = "192.0.2.10"
}

output "www-ptr" {
  value = data.glesys_ip.www-pub.ptr
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `address` (String) IP address

### Read-Only

- `broadcast` (String) IP Broadcast address.
- `datacenter` (String) IP Datacenter association.
- `gateway` (String) Default gateway.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `netmask` (String) IP Netmask, IPv4: NN.NN.NN.NN, IPv6: /nn
- `platform` (String) IP Associated platform.
- `ptr` (String) IP PTR.
